Citation
History of Maunsell or Mansel, and of Crayford, Gabbett, Knoyle, Persse, Toler, Waller, Castletown
Waller, Prior Park; Warren, White, Winthrop, and Mansell of Guernsey.
Comp. by Robert George Maunsell.
Published 1903 by Guy and Company, Limited in Cork .
Written in English.

zh.Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mansel於1092年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登時，他的父親Henry Maunsel24歲，母親Emma deLucy24歲。他於1112年與Elaine DeLutterell在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1164年在英國英格蘭享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mansel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Mansel was born in 1092, in Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Maunsel, was 24 and his mother, Emma deLucy, was 24. He married Elaine DeLutterell in 1112, in Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1164, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

Il a épousé Elaine DeLutterell en 1112, à Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1164, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

ja.Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Engla: イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデン
ja.lifeSummary: John Manselが1092年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデンで生まれた時，父Henry Maunselは24歳，母Emma deLucyは24歳であった。1112年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデンでElaine DeLutterellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1164年にイギリスイギリスで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mansel(이)가 1092년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 리틀 미센든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Maunsel(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma deLucy(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1112년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 리틀 미센든에서 Elaine DeLutterell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1164년 영국 잉글랜드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mansel родился в 1092 г. в местности литл миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Maunsel было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Emma deLucy, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elaine DeLutterell в 1112 г. в местности литл миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1164 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.
